---
title: "First Dose of COVID Vaccine"
description: "Very proud to receive my first COVID vaccine — incredibly lucky and privileged."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-04-26"
categories: [biomedical, science, personal, photo]
image: cover.jpg
---

![COVID vaccine first dose. Image from [berthub.eu](https://berthub.eu/articles/posts/reverse-engineering-source-code-of-the-biontech-pfizer-vaccine/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Very proud to have received my first dose of COVID vaccine today. How incredibly lucky and privileged I am to be living in this time and benefiting from this scientific miracle, an mRNA-based vaccine developed within a record time!

So many things had to happen before this moment to make it real: the long string of scientific ingenuities, the bravery of immigrants, a place where merits and innovations are still rewarded regardless of race, color, religion, and national origin, the persistent pursuit for a scientific dream, the personal sacrifices and perseverance, and the incredibly disciplined teamwork - all of these ingredients to make up this little dose of medicine just in time!

* Reverse engineering Pfizer vaccine: <https://berthub.eu/articles/posts/reverse-engineering-source-code-of-the-biontech-pfizer-vaccine/>
* The scientist behind the mRNA-based vaccines - Katalin Karikó: <https://www.nytimes.com/2021/04/08/health/coronavirus-mrna-kariko.html>
* How Pfizer makes its Covid-19 vaccine: <https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2021/health/pfizer-coronavirus-vaccine.html>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_covid19-vaccine-science-activity-6792699578941616129-54zZ).*
